_comment: Per-model overrides. These take precedence over sampling defaults in settings.json.

Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-8bit.description: Unsloth-recommended sampling for Qwen3.6 coding/agentic tasks. Source: https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/qwen3.6 — also validated by multiple r/LocalLLaMA threads (see llm.md notes).
Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-8bit._comment_thinking: Cap thinking tokens to prevent infinite reasoning loops. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B is prone to these — see https://www.reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA/comments/1spdvpo/ and https://itayinbarr.substack.com/p/honey-i-shrunk-the-coding-agent (little-coder used 2048; we use 8192 for more headroom on complex tasks).

gemma-4-26b-a4b-it-4bit.description: Tuned for summarization/RAG. Low temp reduces hallucination. Thinking disabled — unnecessary overhead for non-reasoning tasks. Sources: Google model card, HuggingFace gemma-4-26B-A4B-it, r/LocalLLaMA benchmarks, https://gemma4guide.com/guides/gemma4-config-guide
gemma-4-26b-a4b-it-4bit._comment_thinking: Gemma 4 supports thinking via <|think|> tokens but it's wasted compute for summarization. The 26B MoE variant may still emit empty thought channel tags when disabled — this is expected.
